products.name: Bosch 18V 1/2" Hammer Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Bosch's compact hammer drill/driver delivers 490 in-lbs of torque with a brushless motor. The 2-speed gearbox and 22,000 BPM hammer action handle concrete, masonry, wood, and metal. Part of the AMPShare multi-brand 18V platform compatible with 15+ tool brands.
features: Brushless motor for extended runtime and durability
22,000 BPM for hammer drilling into masonry
AMPShare compatible with 15+ brands including Fein, Husqvarna

products.name: Bosch 18V 1/2" Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact brushless drill/driver delivering 400 in-lbs of torque with excellent power-to-size ratio. The head length is only 6.3 inches, making it ideal for tight spaces. Part of the Bosch 18V AMPShare ecosystem.
features: 400 in-lbs max torque with brushless motor

products.name: Bosch 18V Chameleon Drill/Driver with 5-In-1 Flexiclick System (Tool Only)
products.description: The unique Flexiclick system lets you swap between 4 different attachment heads: keyless chuck, offset angle, right angle, and locking bit holder. 535 in-lbs of torque handles demanding applications. Perfect for professionals who need versatility in tight spaces.
features: Compact design accesses tight spaces with different heads

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless 1/2" Hammer Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Bosch's high-performance hammer drill/driver packs 800 in-lbs of torque into a compact brushless design. Ideal for demanding drilling into concrete, masonry, wood, and metal. Part of the growing Bosch 18V ecosystem.
features: Brushless motor for extended life and runtime

products.name: Bosch 18V 1/4" Hex Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact brushless impact driver delivering 1,800 in-lbs of torque for heavy fastening. 4,200 IPM drives large lag bolts and deck screws with ease. Part of the Bosch 18V AMPShare system.
features: Brushless motor for runtime and durability

products.name: Bosch 18V Two-In-One 1/4" and 1/2" Bit/Socket Impact Driver/Wrench (Tool Only)
products.description: Unique two-in-one tool that accepts both 1/4-inch hex bits AND 1/2-inch square sockets — eliminating the need to carry separate impact driver and impact wrench. 1,800 in-lbs of torque handles everything from deck screws to lug nuts.
features: Brushless motor for power and runtime
Eliminates need for separate impact wrench

products.name: Bosch 18V Connected-Ready 1/4" Hex Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Top-of-line connected-ready impact driver with 1,860 in-lbs of torque and Bluetooth connectivity for tool tracking and customization. Premium brushless motor delivers pro-level performance.
features: Customize speed and torque settings via app
Brushless motor for maximum power and runtime
3 speed settings plus self-tapping screw mode

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: PROFACTOR delivers corded-class cutting power from an 18V battery. The 7-1/4-inch blade cuts through 2x lumber easily, and the BITURBO Brushless motor paired with CORE18V 8Ah or 12Ah batteries provides all-day cutting on the jobsite.
features: PROFACTOR BITURBO Brushless motor for corded performance
7-1/4-inch blade cuts through any framing lumber

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 7-1/4" Circular Saw with Track Compatibility (Tool Only)
products.description: All the power of the PROFACTOR circular saw plus track compatibility for perfectly straight, splinter-free cuts. Works with Bosch track system for precision plywood and sheet goods cutting.
features: Anti-snag lower guard for smooth cuts

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless 6-1/2" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact 6-1/2-inch circular saw for lighter cutting tasks. Blade-left design gives clear line of sight to the cut line. More portable than a full 7-1/4-inch saw while still cutting through most framing lumber.
features: Compact blade-left design for cut line visibility

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless 1-1/4" Stroke Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: The first cordless reciprocating saw with both orbital and non-orbital sawing action. The multi-grip design works in any orientation, and the 1-1/4-inch stroke length with orbital action tears through wood faster than competitors.
features: First cordless recip with orbital action
Multi-grip handle design for any cutting position
Tool-free blade change with one-handed lever

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless Barrel-Grip Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Bosch's barrel-grip jig saw design is the industry standard for precision curve cutting. The brushless motor delivers 800-3,800 SPM with 4-position orbital action. Connected-ready for Bluetooth tool management.
features: Precision Control System II for smooth starts

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 12" Dual-Bevel Glide Miter Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: The crown jewel of Bosch's cordless lineup. The Axial-Glide system is more compact than rail-slide designs while delivering a massive 13-3/4-inch crosscut capacity. PROFACTOR power makes this the first truly cordless 12-inch miter saw that matches corded performance.

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 10" Dual-Bevel Slide Miter Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact 10-inch sliding miter saw with PROFACTOR power. The smaller blade makes it more portable while still handling crown molding, trim, and framing cuts. Dual-bevel eliminates workpiece flipping.

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 5-6" Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
products.description: PROFACTOR brushless angle grinder delivers corded-equivalent power for grinding, cutting, and surface preparation. The paddle switch provides secure grip, and Kickback Control helps prevent injury.

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V SDS-plus 1-1/4" Rotary Hammer (Tool Only)
products.description: The go-to cordless rotary hammer for concrete drilling. SDS-plus chuck accepts the widest range of masonry bits, and 2.6 ft-lbs of impact energy drills anchor holes in concrete all day. Vibration Control keeps you comfortable.

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V SDS-max 1-9/16" Rotary Hammer Kit
products.description: Heavy-duty cordless SDS-max rotary hammer delivers 5.6 ft-lbs of impact energy — rivaling corded hammers. Comes with two CORE18V 12Ah batteries. Drills large-diameter holes in concrete and demolishes tile and masonry.
features: 5.6 ft-lbs impact energy rivals corded performance

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 1/2" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
products.description: PROFACTOR 1/2-inch impact wrench with 553 ft-lbs of fastening torque. Friction ring anvil for quick socket changes. The brushless motor delivers corded-class power for automotive work, construction, and heavy fastening.
features: Friction ring anvil for fast socket changes

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 3/4" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
products.description: Heavy-duty 3/4-inch impact wrench for the most demanding fastening applications. 770 ft-lbs of nut-busting torque handles large bolts on heavy equipment, structural steel, and commercial construction.

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless oscillating multi-tool with best-in-class 3.4° oscillation angle for faster, more efficient cutting. StarlockPlus interface accepts a wide range of accessories for cutting, sanding, scraping, and grout removal.
features: Brushless motor for power and runtime
Variable speed dial for material-specific control

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless Colt Palm Router (Tool Only)
products.description: Bosch finally brought its legendary Colt router to cordless. Variable speed from 10,000 to 30,000 RPM handles edge profiling, hinge mortising, decorative inlays, and trimming. The dust extraction system keeps your workspace clean.
features: Accepts Bosch plunge and tilt bases

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless 1/4-Sheet Sander (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact 1/4-sheet sander for finish sanding flat surfaces. Microfilter dust canister captures fine particles. Brushless motor provides smooth operation and extended runtime on a single charge.

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V Blower (Tool Only)
products.description: Jobsite blower for clearing sawdust, debris, and leaves from work areas. PROFACTOR brushless motor delivers 450 CFM of airflow. Compact and lightweight for one-handed operation.

products.name: Bosch 18V 2.6-Gallon Wet/Dry Vacuum (Tool Only)
products.description: Portable wet/dry vacuum with HEPA filter for jobsite cleanup. 2.6-gallon tank handles workshop dust and small spills. Runs on any Bosch 18V battery for cordless convenience.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 1/2" Hammer Drill/Driver (Tool Only)

features: Brushless motor for power and longevity
LIFETIME SERVICE AGREEMENT — free parts and service for life
Compatible with all Ridgid 18V batteries including MAX Output

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 1/4" Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Powerful brushless impact driver delivering 1,850 in-lbs of torque. Hex quick-eject chuck makes bit changes fast. Covered by Ridgid's industry-leading Lifetime Service Agreement. Home Depot exclusive.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless Stealth Force Impulse Driver (Tool Only)

features: Oil impulse mechanism for smooth driving
Brushless motor with Lifetime Service Agreement

products.name: Ridgid 18V SubCompact Brushless 1/2" Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: SubCompact brushless drill/driver is 30% more compact and lighter than standard models while still delivering 525 in-lbs of torque. Perfect for tight spaces and overhead work. Lifetime Service Agreement included.

products.name: Ridgid 18V SubCompact Brushless 3/8" Right Angle Drill (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 1/2" Stud and Joist Drill (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 1/2" High Torque Impact Wrench (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 3/8" Ratchet (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless Rear Handle Circular Saw (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V SubCompact Brushless Band Saw (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless 4-1/2" Angle Grinder (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V 5" Random Orbit Sander (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V SubCompact Brushless 1/4 Sheet Sander (Tool Only)
products.description: SubCompact 1/4-sheet sander for detail and finish sanding. Brushless motor provides smooth, swirl-free sanding with extended battery life. Dust collection bag captures most particles.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless Compact Blower (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact jobsite blower clears sawdust, leaves, and debris from work surfaces and garage floors. Lightweight and one-handed operation. Not for heavy yard work, but perfect for workshop cleanup.

products.name: Ridgid 18V 360° Area Light (Tool Only)

products.name: Ridgid 18V Dual Function Inflator (Tool Only)

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt Brushless 1/2" Driver Drill Kit

Brushless motor for runtime and durability

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt Compact Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt Compact Blower (Tool Only)

products.name: Craftsman V20 1/2" Drill/Driver Kit with Battery

products.name: Craftsman V20 Brushless 1/2" Drill/Driver Kit

products.name: Craftsman V20 Brushless RP 1/2" Drill/Driver Kit
products.description: Top-tier V20 drill with RP (Ridiculously Powerful) brushless motor. 550 in-lbs of torque approaches DeWalt performance at a significantly lower price point. The best drill in the Craftsman lineup.

products.name: Craftsman V20 Brushless 1/4" Impact Driver (Tool Only)

products.description: HART's brushless drill delivers up to 20% faster performance with 30% more power than their brushed models. 24-position clutch provides precise torque control. Walmart exclusive at an excellent price.

products.name: HART 20V 1/2" Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: The most affordable cordless drill on the market. Perfect for basic homeowner tasks: hanging pictures, assembling furniture, tightening screws. Won't win any power contests, but it gets simple jobs done at an unbeatable price.

products.name: HART 20V 1/4" Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Impressive 1,800 in-lbs of torque at a budget price point. Handles deck screws, lag bolts, and heavy fastening tasks. Variable speed trigger and onboard bit storage add convenience.
features: 1,800 in-lbs of torque — impressive for the price

products.name: HART 20V 6-1/2" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget circular saw that cuts through 2x4 lumber. 4,700 RPM motor provides clean cuts. Vacuum attachment included for dust management. An affordable option for occasional cutting projects.

products.name: HART 20V Brushless 7-1/4" Circular Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Full-size 7-1/4-inch brushless circular saw for serious cutting. 38% faster cutting and 34% more cuts per charge versus the brushed model. Handles all framing lumber and sheet goods.
features: Brushless motor for 34% more cuts per charge

products.name: HART 20V Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget reciprocating saw for demolition, remodeling, and pruning. Variable speed trigger and adjustable pivoting shoe. Quick blade change lever for fast swaps.
features: Cuts wood, metal, plastic, and PVC

products.name: HART 20V Brushless Reciprocating Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless upgrade with longer 1-1/4-inch stroke for 70% faster cutting. 65% more cuts per charge vs brushed model. Variable speed and pivoting shoe for controlled cuts.
features: Brushless motor for 65% more cuts per charge

products.name: HART 20V Orbital Jigsaw (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget orbital jigsaw with 4 orbital settings for cutting wood, metal, and plastic. Variable speed from 1,300-3,000 SPM. Lock-on switch for continuous cuts. Excellent value for occasional jigsaw work.

products.name: HART 20V Brushless Orbital Jigsaw (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless jigsaw with 58% longer runtime and 36% faster cutting than the brushed model. Non-marring shoe protects finished surfaces. Tool-free blade release for quick changes.

products.name: HART 20V Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget oscillating multi-tool for cutting, sanding, scraping, and grinding. Variable speed dial adjusts from 0-20,000 OPM. Includes sanding pads, segmented blade, and wood blade.

products.name: HART 20V 4-1/2" Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget angle grinder under $50 for occasional metal grinding and cutting. 6,500 RPM handles basic grinding tasks. Two-finger trigger for safety. Includes grinding wheel and guard.

products.name: HART 20V Brushless 4-1/2" Angle Grinder (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless upgrade with 9,200 RPM for 25% faster cutting and 45% more cuts per charge. Paddle switch design and tool-free guard. Significant step up from the brushed model.

products.name: HART 20V 5" Random Orbital Sander (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget-friendly 5-inch random orbital sander. Hook-and-loop pad changes sandpaper quickly. Dust bag and vacuum port keep the workspace cleaner. Includes 3 grits of sandpaper to get started.
features: Dust bag and vacuum port (1-1/4" and 1-7/8")

products.name: HART 20V 18-Gauge Brad Nailer (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless brad nailer for trim, molding, and cabinet work. 105-brad magazine and 600 nails per charge on a 1.5Ah battery. Tool-free jam release and depth adjustment. Incredible value at this price.
features: Tool-free depth adjustment with 2 no-mar pads

products.name: HART 20V 3/8" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
products.description: 3/8-inch impact wrench for automotive work — spark plugs, alternators, and smaller bolts. 230 ft-lbs of torque with friction ring for quick socket changes. Budget-friendly for weekend mechanics.

products.name: HART 20V Brushless 1/2" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless 1/2-inch impact wrench with an impressive 600 ft-lbs of breakaway torque. 70% more torque than brushed motors. 3 speed settings for control. Removes lug nuts and handles serious automotive work.

products.name: HART 20V 3/8" Ratchet (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless 3/8-inch ratchet for automotive and mechanical fastening. 35 ft-lbs of torque at up to 230 RPM. Slim profile fits tight engine bays. 14.25 inches long for extra leverage.

products.name: HART 20V 1/4" Ratchet (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact 1/4-inch ratchet for smaller fasteners and tight spaces. 30 ft-lbs of torque handles small automotive and appliance repair. Overmolded grip and LED work light.

products.name: HART 20V Rotary Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless rotary tool with 33 included accessories for sanding, cutting, buffing, engraving, and polishing. Variable speed from 5,000 to 34,000 RPM. Pen shaft design for detailed work.

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless 3-1/4" Planer (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless hand planer for trimming door edges, chamfering, and surface smoothing. 3-1/4-inch cutting width and 14,000 RPM deliver smooth, tear-free cuts. Dual-mount fence for precise edge planing.

products.name: Bosch 18V Brushless 5" Random Orbit Sander (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless 5-inch random orbit sander with low-vibration design for swirl-free finishing. Microfilter dust canister captures 90%+ of dust. Variable speed for different materials.

products.name: Bosch 18V REVOLVE2000 Self-Leveling Rotary Laser (Tool Only)
products.description: Professional rotary laser with 2,000-foot range runs on Bosch 18V batteries or AC power. Self-leveling with ±5° range. Sets grades, aligns walls, and levels floors with 1/16-inch accuracy at 100 feet.

products.name: Bosch PROFACTOR 18V 8-1/4" Table Saw Module (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless table saw module with 24-1/2-inch rip capacity. PROFACTOR motor delivers corded performance for ripping plywood and dimensional lumber. Part of Bosch's modular workstation system.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless jigsaw with 4 orbital settings for cutting curves in wood, metal, and plastic. Tool-free blade change and adjustable shoe. Covered by Ridgid's Lifetime Service Agreement.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Flood Light (Tool Only)
products.description: Portable flood light for illuminating work areas during renovation and construction. 2,500 lumens on high with 3 brightness modes. Adjustable head aims light where you need it.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Cordless Wet/Dry Shop Vacuum (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless wet/dry shop vacuum for jobsite and workshop cleanup. 3-gallon capacity handles debris from cutting, drilling, and sanding. Runs on the same 18V batteries as all Ridgid power tools.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Cordless Pruner (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless pruning shears cut branches up to 1-1/4 inches in diameter. Brushless motor provides clean, effortless cuts for pruning bushes, rose bushes, and small tree branches.

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt Brushless Jig Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless barrel-grip jig saw with 4 orbital settings and variable speed. 45° bevel and tool-free blade change. Compatible with both 18V and MultiVolt batteries.

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt Brushless Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless oscillating multi-tool for cutting, sanding, and scraping. Variable speed dial with up to 18,000 OPM. Universal accessory interface accepts blades from multiple brands.

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt 5" Random Orbit Sander (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless random orbit sander with variable speed up to 12,000 OPM. Dust collection bag and vacuum port keep workspace clean. Hook-and-loop pad for quick paper changes.

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt LED Work Light (Tool Only)
products.description: Portable LED work light with 1,800 lumens for illuminating work areas. 3 brightness modes and adjustable head. Works with all Metabo HPT 18V and MultiVolt batteries.

products.name: Craftsman V20 Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget oscillating multi-tool for cutting, sanding, and scraping. Universal accessory system accepts blades from all major brands. 18,000 OPM variable speed.

products.name: Craftsman V20 LED Work Light (Tool Only)
products.description: Portable LED work light for illuminating dark corners during projects. 140-lumen output with a wide flood beam. Compact and uses V20 batteries for cordless convenience.

products.name: Craftsman V20 Brushless RP 7-1/4" Sliding Miter Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact sliding miter saw for trim, molding, and light framing. 7-1/4-inch blade keeps it portable while the sliding mechanism handles wider crosscuts. Runs on V20 batteries or available as a corded version.

products.name: Craftsman V20 Cordless Stick Vacuum (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless stick vacuum for quick workshop and garage cleanups. Converts from stick to handheld. Uses V20 batteries for convenient portable cleanup between projects.
features: Floor nozzle and crevice tool included

products.name: Craftsman V20 Inflator (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless inflator for tires, sports balls, and inflatables. Digital gauge with auto-shutoff at target pressure. Comes with needle, nozzle, and Presta valve adapter. Keep it in your trunk for emergencies.
features: Uses V20 batteries or 12V DC car adapter

products.name: Kobalt Next-Gen 24V 2-Tool Brushless Combo Kit
products.description: Next-Gen 2-tool combo kit with brushless drill/driver and impact driver plus 2Ah battery and charger. The most popular entry point to the Kobalt 24V ecosystem. Excellent value at Lowe's.

products.name: Kobalt Next-Gen 24V 4-Tool Brushless Combo Kit
products.description: Best-value 4-tool combo kit with drill/driver, impact driver, reciprocating saw, and LED light. Includes 4Ah battery, 150W rapid charger, and bag. One purchase covers the basics for most homeowners.
features: Drill/driver, impact driver, recip saw, LED light

products.name: Kobalt 24V Brushless Compact 1/2" Impact Wrench (Tool Only)
products.description: Compact brushless 1/2-inch impact wrench for lighter automotive work. Less torque than the full-size model but significantly smaller and lighter. Handles lug nuts on passenger vehicles.

products.name: Kobalt 24V 150W Rapid Charger
products.description: 150W rapid charger recharges the 4Ah battery in just 60 minutes. A must-have upgrade over the standard 85W charger for contractors and heavy users who can't wait around for batteries.

products.name: HART 20V 1/2" Hammer Drill (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget hammer drill for occasional masonry drilling. Adds hammer mode to the standard drill for drilling into brick, block, and mortar. Not for heavy concrete work but handles light masonry tasks.
features: Hammer mode for light masonry drilling

products.name: HART 20V Brushless 1/4" Impact Driver (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless impact driver with an impressive 2,150 in-lbs of torque — rivaling tools twice the price. 3 speed settings provide control for delicate work and heavy fastening. A standout performer in the HART lineup.
features: 2,150 in-lbs of torque — best in class at this price

products.name: HART 20V Detail Sander (Tool Only)
products.description: Triangular detail sander for corners, edges, and tight spaces that a round sander cannot reach. 14,000 OPM with hook-and-loop pad. Perfect for window trim, cabinet doors, and furniture refinishing.

products.name: HART 20V Power Source/Inverter (Tool Only)
products.description: Turn any HART 20V battery into a portable power source. 120V AC outlet charges laptops and runs small appliances. 2 USB ports for phones and tablets. Essential for remote work and camping.

products.name: Bosch 18V 16-Gauge Straight Finish Nailer (Tool Only)
products.description: 16-gauge cordless finish nailer for baseboards, crown molding, door casings, and cabinetry. Air-powered mechanism feels like a pneumatic nailer. No compressor or hoses required.

products.name: Bosch 18V 18-Gauge Brad Nailer (Tool Only)
products.description: 18-gauge cordless brad nailer for light trim, picture frames, and delicate moldings. Air-powered mechanism for consistent drive depth without damaging soft woods. Part of the Bosch 18V system.

products.name: Ridgid 18V Brushless Track Saw (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless track saw for precision straight cuts in plywood, hardwoods, and sheet goods. Splinter-free cuts replace a table saw for many applications. Brushless motor and Lifetime Service Agreement.

products.name: Craftsman V20 21° Framing Nailer (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless framing nailer for deck building, fencing, and framing. 21-degree magazine provides clearance for tight corners. No compressor needed — just load nails and go.

products.name: Craftsman V20 13" String Trimmer/Edger (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless string trimmer/edger for maintaining lawn edges, trimming around fences, and cleaning up sidewalk borders. Converts from trimmer to edger with shaft rotation. Uses V20 batteries.
features: Converts to edger with shaft rotation

products.name: HART 20V Hybrid Leaf Blower (Tool Only)
products.description: Budget-friendly cordless leaf blower for clearing driveways, patios, and light yard debris. 200 CFM and 130 MPH handles leaves and grass clippings. Excellent value at under $50.

products.name: HART 20V 10" String Trimmer (Tool Only)
products.description: Ultra-budget cordless string trimmer for light-duty trimming. 10-inch cutting swath handles small yards and basic edging. The most affordable way to go cordless on string trimming.

products.name: Kobalt 24V Brushless Leaf Blower (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless cordless leaf blower with 410 CFM airflow for clearing driveways, patios, and yards. Variable speed trigger and turbo button for stubborn debris. Uses Kobalt 24V batteries.

products.name: Kobalt 24V Brushless 13" String Trimmer (Tool Only)
products.description: Brushless cordless string trimmer with 13-inch cutting swath. Converts from trimmer to edger with shaft rotation. Auto-feed line head eliminates bump feeding. Lowe's exclusive.

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt 30° Brushless 3-1/2" Paper Tape Framing Nailer Kit
products.description: 30-degree paper tape framing nailer — the other magazine angle option from Metabo HPT's legendary cordless nailer line. Same air-spring drive system with 120 joules of power. Paper tape collation feeds smoothly.

products.name: Metabo HPT 18V MultiVolt Cordless Radio (Tool Only)
products.description: Cordless jobsite radio with Bluetooth streaming and AM/FM tuner. Runs on Metabo HPT 18V batteries or AC power. Rugged construction withstands jobsite conditions.
